ddls:
CREATE TABLE "srs" (
  "srid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each SRS */,
  "is_geographic" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the SRS is geographic (0) or projected (1) */,
  "has_flipped_axes" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the SRS has flipped axes (0) or not (1) */,
  "spheroid" TEXT /* Name of the spheroid used in the SRS */,
  "prime_meridian" TEXT /* Name of the prime meridian used in the SRS */,
  "datum" TEXT /* Name of the datum used in the SRS */,
  "projection" TEXT /* Name of the projection used in the SRS */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement used in the SRS (e.g., meter, degree) */,
  "axis_1_name" TEXT /* Name of the first axis (e.g., Easting) */,
  "axis_1_orientation" TEXT /* Orientation of the first axis (e.g., East) */,
  "axis_2_name" TEXT /* Name of the second axis (e.g., Northing) */,
  "axis_2_orientation" TEXT /* Orientation of the second axis (e.g., North) */,
  "srs_type" TEXT /* Type of the SRS (e.g., projected, geographic, compound) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the SRS */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the SRS was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the SRS was last modified */,
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the SRS */,
  "modifier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the SRS */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("srid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_srs_spheroid FOREIGN KEY ("spheroid") REFERENCES spheroids ("spheroid_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_srs_datum FOREIGN KEY ("datum") REFERENCES datums ("datum_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_srs_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("creator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_srs_prime_meridian FOREIGN KEY ("prime_meridian") REFERENCES prime_meridians ("prime_meridian_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_srs_unit FOREIGN KEY ("unit") REFERENCES units ("unit_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_srs_modifier_id FOREIGN KEY ("modifier_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_srs_axis_1_name FOREIGN KEY ("axis_1_name") REFERENCES axis ("axis_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_srs_projection FOREIGN KEY ("projection") REFERENCES projections ("projection_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_srs_axis_2_name FOREIGN KEY ("axis_2_name") REFERENCES axis ("axis_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "spheroids" (
  "spheroid_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each spheroid */,
  "spheroid_name" TEXT /* Name of the spheroid (e.g., Clarke 1880 (RGS)) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the spheroid */,
  "semimajor_axis" TEXT /* Length of the semimajor axis of the spheroid */,
  "flattening" TEXT /* Flattening factor of the spheroid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spheroid_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prime_meridians" (
  "prime_meridian_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prime meridian */,
  "prime_meridian_name" TEXT /* Name of the prime meridian (e.g., Greenwich) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the prime meridian */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the prime meridian in degrees */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prime_meridian_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datums" (
  "datum_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each datum */,
  "datum_name" TEXT /* Name of the datum (e.g., Anguilla_1957) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the datum */,
  "spheroid_id" INTEGER /* ID of the spheroid used in the datum */,
  "prime_meridian_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prime meridian used in the datum */,
  "ellipsoid_height" TEXT /* Ellipsoid height of the datum */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("datum_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datums_spheroid_id FOREIGN KEY ("spheroid_id") REFERENCES spheroids ("spheroid_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datums_prime_meridian_id FOREIGN KEY ("prime_meridian_id") REFERENCES prime_meridians ("prime_meridian_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projections" (
  "projection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each projection */,
  "projection_name" TEXT /* Name of the projection (e.g., Transverse_Mercator) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the projection */,
  "standard_parallel_1" TEXT /* First standard parallel of the projection */,
  "standard_parallel_2" TEXT /* Second standard parallel of the projection */,
  "central_meridian" TEXT /* Central meridian of the projection */,
  "latitude_of_origin" TEXT /* Latitude of origin of the projection */,
  "scale_factor" TEXT /* Scale factor of the projection */,
  "false_easting" TEXT /* False easting of the projection */,
  "false_northing" TEXT /* False northing of the projection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("projection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit (e.g., meter) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the unit */,
  "conversion_factor" TEXT /* Conversion factor to a standard unit (e.g., meters) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "axis" (
  "axis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each axis */,
  "axis_name" TEXT /* Name of the axis (e.g., Easting) */,
  "orientation" TEXT /* Orientation of the axis (e.g., East) */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit used for the axis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("axis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_axis_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "srs_validations" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation */,
  "srid" INTEGER /* ID of the SRS being validated */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date the validation was performed */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the validation (e.g., valid, invalid) */,
  "validated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the validation */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the validation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_srs_validations_validated_by FOREIGN KEY ("validated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_srs_validations_srid FOREIGN KEY ("srid") REFERENCES srs ("srid")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., GIS analyst, data administrator, developer) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "srid" INTEGER /* ID of the SRS being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the SRS */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the SRS was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the SRS */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the SRS */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_srid FOREIGN KEY ("srid") REFERENCES srs ("srid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
